abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Shafted
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model within 8" of this model suffers damage from hazardous terrain, this model may have it gain a Staggered token.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Miner's Tools
actions.costs_and_restrictions: The target may not drain (fortitude) during this action.

triggers.name: Weigh Down
triggers.text: Target must have a friendly upgrade attached. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Tremors
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)1" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Shifting Sands
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 2".

actions.name: Unchecked Greed
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme or Remains marker.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target. Draw a card.
